mapper.sql: select s.event_settlement_id as eventSettlementId, s.settlement_no as settlementNo, s.partner_id as partnerId, p.partner_name as partnerName, s.contest_id as contestId, c.contest_name as contestName, ifnull(oc.enroll_count, 0) as enrollCount, s.total_list_amount as totalListAmount, s.total_coupon_amount as totalCouponAmount, s.total_points_amount as totalPointsAmount, s.platform_bear_amount as platformBearAmount, s.total_net_pay as totalNetPay, s.total_refund as totalRefund, s.total_rebate as totalRebate, s.total_service_fee as totalServiceFee, s.contract_deduction as contractDeduction, s.final_amount as finalAmount, s.status as status, s.audit_remark as auditRemark, s.pay_voucher_url as payVoucherUrl, s.pay_time as payTime, s.create_time as createTime from jst_event_settlement s left join jst_event_partner p on p.partner_id = s.partner_id and p.del_flag = '0' left join jst_contest c on c.contest_id = s.contest_id and c.del_flag = '0' left join ( select partner_id, contest_id, count(order_id) as enroll_count from jst_order_main where del_flag = '0' and business_type = 'enroll' group by partner_id, contest_id ) oc on oc.partner_id = s.partner_id and oc.contest_id = s.contest_id
mapper.select: select o.order_id as orderId, o.order_no as orderNo, o.user_id as userId, o.participant_id as participantId, o.pay_method as payMethod, o.pay_time as payTime, o.list_amount as listAmount, o.coupon_amount as couponAmount, o.points_deduct_amount as pointsDeductAmount, o.platform_bear_amount as platformBearAmount, o.net_pay_amount as netPayAmount, o.service_fee as serviceFee, o.order_status as orderStatus, o.refund_status as refundStatus from jst_order_main o where o.del_flag = '0' and o.business_type = 'enroll' and o.partner_id = #{partnerId} and o.contest_id = #{contestId} order by o.pay_time desc, o.order_id desc

select 'payout' as fileType, pay_no as fileNo, concat('打款凭证-', pay_no) as fileName, voucher_url as fileUrl, 'paid' as status, create_time as createTime from jst_payment_pay_record where del_flag = '0' and business_type = 'event_settlement' and business_id = #{eventSettlementId} and target_type = 'partner' and target_id = #{partnerId} order by pay_time desc, pay_record_id desc

select 'contract' as fileType, contract_no as fileNo, concat('合同-', contract_no) as fileName, file_url as fileUrl, status as status, create_time as createTime from jst_contract_record where del_flag = '0' and target_type = 'partner' and target_id = #{partnerId} and (ref_settlement_id = #{eventSettlementId} or ref_settlement_id is null) order by create_time desc, contract_id desc

select 'invoice' as fileType, invoice_no as fileNo, invoice_title as fileName, file_url as fileUrl, status as status, create_time as createTime from jst_invoice_record where del_flag = '0' and target_type = 'partner' and target_id = #{partnerId} and ref_settlement_no = #{settlementNo} order by issue_time desc, invoice_id desc
